category_sources: Official Invisible Island page describes dialog as script-driven curses widgets.
source_facts.description says it displays user-friendly message boxes from shell scripts.
display_name_sources: Official manpage title and NAME section use dialog.
docs_sources: Official dialog page links a Documentation section including the dialog program manpage.
source_facts.homepage is the official Invisible Island dialog page.
repo_sources: No official source-control repository was present in source_facts.repo.

tags_sources: Official manpage describes dialog boxes and widget types for shell scripts.
